        "last_name": "{{$randomLastName}}",

        "mobile_number_alt": "",
        "email_id": "{{$randomEmail}}",
        "email_id_alt": ""
    },
    "customer_address": {
        "flat_number": "1",
        "apartment_name": "AP Name",
        "street_name": "1st Street",
        "landmark": "LandMArk",
        "area": "Main Area",
        "pincode": "09876",
        "country": "India",
        "state": "Tamil Nadu"
    },
    "customer_product": {
        "dop": "2025-11-13T18:30:00.000Z",
        "serial_number": "{{IMEI}}",
        "imei1": "{{IMEI}}",
        "imei2": "{{IMEI}}",
        "popurl": "2025-11-13T18:30:00.000Z",
        "product_id": 1,
        "mst_model_id": 2
    },

            "id": 3,
            "remark": "sync up issue"
        }
    ]
}
